grounding.debt_stock: ≈ 16 extra years of the FY2025 federal deficit — on top of what CBO already projects
grounding.fed_deficit_flow: ≈ 2.3× the FY2025 federal deficit, every year — on top of what CBO already projects
grounding.real_gdp: ≈ 25.7 years of normal (~2%/yr) real growth, arriving all at once
grounding.revenue_flow: ≈ 2.5 full years of federal individual income-tax receipts
grounding.state_flow: ≈ 0.8× what all states spend on K-12 schools, every year
